criteria.name: controls_keyboard_accessible
criteria.description: Every interactive control (tabs, form fields, buttons, toggles, Export/Import, Difficulty, Save Progress, Resume Saved Run) is reachable and operable with the keyboard alone, with a visible focus indicator
criteria.reasoning: Native tabs, buttons, inputs, comboboxes, and checkboxes are keyboard reachable; focus visibly cycles through controls. Evidence: keyboard-focus-shared.png

criteria.name: reset_dialog_focus_trap
criteria.description: The Reset Quest confirmation dialog traps focus while open, closes on Escape, and returns focus to the Reset Quest control on close
criteria.reasoning: The reset dialog trapped Tab focus between Cancel and Reset everything, Escape closed it, and focus returned to Reset quest. Evidence: reset-dialog-shared.png

criteria.name: icons_have_accessible_names
criteria.description: Icon-only controls expose accessible names (aria-label or equivalent) so their purpose is available to assistive tech
criteria.reasoning: Icon-only controls exposed accessible names such as Amber accent, Teal accent, Rose accent, and Dismiss notification. Evidence: settings snapshot state in reset-dialog-shared.png

criteria.name: notifications_aria_live
criteria.description: Transient notification banners (zone unlocked, boss defeated, gear bought, quest reset, daily reminder, export/import feedback, Victory, Defeat) are announced through an aria-live region as well as shown visually
criteria.reasoning: Transient feedback appeared visually and in a role=status aria-live=polite region, including Victory and Logged 7 reps. Evidence: victory-shared.png

criteria.name: forms_have_explicit_labels
criteria.description: Log Reps, Settings (dailyGoal, reminderEnabled, reminderHour), and note fields use explicit labels associated with their inputs
criteria.reasoning: Log reps, note, daily goal, reminder, and reminder-hour fields had associated labels verified through the browser DOM. Evidence: quest-shared.png

criteria.name: headings_follow_logical_order
criteria.description: Visible headings follow a logical order without skipping levels across Quest, History, Gear, and Settings
criteria.reasoning: Visible headings followed H1 RepQuest, H2 section headings, and H3 subsections without skipped levels across views. Evidence: quest-shared.png

criteria.name: landmark_navigation_present
criteria.description: Primary regions use landmark structure (main/nav or equivalent roles) so tabs and play surfaces are reachable by landmark navigation
criteria.reasoning: The app exposed banner, tablist navigation, main content, tabpanels, regions, and contentinfo landmarks. Evidence: quest-shared.png

criteria.name: text_and_controls_have_contrast
criteria.description: Body text, totals, and primary controls maintain readable contrast against their backgrounds
criteria.reasoning: Body text and primary controls rendered with bright foreground colors against dark backgrounds, with readable contrast. Evidence: initial-shared.png

criteria.name: canvas_labels_and_text_mirror
criteria.description: Each canvas surface (quest map, weekly summary chart) carries an accessible label describing what it shows, and today's total, lifetime reps, and per-day totals are also available as visible text outside the canvas
criteria.reasoning: The quest map and weekly chart had accessible labels, while lifetime reps, today’s total, and per-day totals were rendered as visible text outside the graphics. Evidence: quest-shared.png

criteria.name: victory_defeat_not_color_only
criteria.description: Victory versus Defeat is distinguishable by text (the words Victory and Defeat), not by color alone
criteria.reasoning: The completed challenge displayed explicit Victory text and the challenge UI exposed textual run-status states, so outcome communication is not color-only. Evidence: victory-shared.png

criteria.name: heatmap_has_text_summary
criteria.description: The streak heat-map exposes a text summary of recent day totals or an accessible description so the pattern is not color-only
criteria.reasoning: The heat-map included accessible per-day button names and a full visible text summary of recent day totals. Evidence: quest-shared.png

criteria.name: reduced_motion_respected
criteria.description: When prefers-reduced-motion is enabled, non-essential motion (confetti loops, attention pulses) is reduced or disabled while controls remain usable
criteria.reasoning: With prefers-reduced-motion enabled, computed transition durations were reduced to 0.01s and animations were non-looping while controls remained usable. Evidence: reduced-motion-shared.png

criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: A paused Hard run checkpoint with exact fields was not saved and restored. Evidence: challenge_lifecycle_and_targets.png

criteria.name: quest_log_nested_schema_matches_live_state
criteria.description: Export Quest Log JSON contains schemaVersion, exportedAt, dailyGoal, streak, lifetimeReps, questPoints, unlockedZones, unlockedGearIds, equippedGearId, defeatedBossIds, and sets; every set contains setId, reps, loggedAt, and note when present, and all exported values match the live session
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The live JSON preview showed most required top-level fields, but the complete nested set contract including note presence was not fully verified. Evidence: gear_unlock_and_equip-after-equip.png

criteria.name: workout_csv_is_chronological
criteria.description: After logging sets at distinguishable times, Export Workout CSV uses the exact header date,reps,note and contains one row per History set in oldest-to-newest chronological order, with reps and notes matching the corresponding exported JSON sets
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: CSV contents were not directly inspected for header, row order, reps, and notes. Evidence: reset_quest_confirmation_flow-after-reset.png

criteria.name: import_restores_complete_quest_state
criteria.description: After exporting a session with workout sets, an unlocked zone, a defeated boss, equipped gear, and changed daily-goal state, resetting and importing restores dailyGoal, streak, lifetimeReps, questPoints, unlockedZones, unlockedGearIds, equippedGearId, defeatedBossIds, full History, and derived records and heatmap state; a fresh export matches the restored state
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: The complete export-reset-import workflow with unlocked zone, defeated boss, equipped gear, and derived-state comparison was not completed. Evidence: reset_quest_confirmation_flow-after-reset.png

criteria.name: overview_composition_matches_reference
criteria.description: At desktop width the overall Quest composition (map, log form, progress, chart region, tab chrome) matches the reference overview structure; where screenshot and instruction conflict, instruction wins
criteria.reasoning: Desktop overview visibly combines the quest map, log form, progress/streak, records, heat-map, weekly chart, and history state in a centered stacked composition. Evidence: overview-shared.png

criteria.name: segment_map_region_matches
criteria.description: The quest map canvas region and waypoint path placement align with the reference segments' map treatment
criteria.reasoning: The overview visibly shows a horizontal illustrated map with character, numbered waypoints, path, and red boss markers. Evidence: overview-shared.png

criteria.name: tab_chrome_matches_reference
criteria.description: Quest / History / Gear / Settings tab chrome placement and active treatment align with the reference
criteria.reasoning: Quest, History, Gear, and Settings tabs are consistently placed in a horizontal chrome with a clear gold active underline/color treatment. Evidence: overview-shared.png

criteria.name: progress_and_streak_placement
criteria.description: Daily-goal progress and Current Streak placement match the reference hierarchy near the quest map
criteria.reasoning: Daily goal and Current streak appear together in a two-column card immediately below the log form, matching the intended hierarchy. Evidence: overview-shared.png

criteria.name: gear_shop_card_layout
criteria.description: Gear Shop cards show cost and locked/unlocked treatment in a layout consistent with the reference gear segment
criteria.reasoning: Gear Shop visibly presents a six-card grid with one equipped outfit and locked cards showing lock icons and QP costs. Evidence: gear-shared.png

criteria.name: history_list_layout
criteria.description: History list rows with reps and timestamps match the reference list density and ordering cues
criteria.reasoning: History visibly shows a compact row containing logged reps, date/time, and set metadata, followed by the heat-map. Evidence: history-shared.png

criteria.name: settings_form_layout
criteria.description: Settings daily goal and reminder controls match the reference settings segment structure
criteria.reasoning: Settings visibly groups daily goal, save control, reminder toggle/time, accent choices, and reset action in a coherent form card. Evidence: settings-shared.png

criteria.name: weekly_chart_region
criteria.description: The weekly summary chart region sits where the reference shows it relative to the map and progress
criteria.reasoning: The overview visibly places Weekly summary below the streak heat-map and above History state, with a chart, goal line, weekday labels, and daily totals. Evidence: overview-shared.png

criteria.name: spacing_and_sizing_follow_reference
criteria.description: Spacing and control sizing follow the reference scale rather than a cramped or oversized reinterpretation
criteria.reasoning: Desktop cards, controls, gutters, typography, and content width are consistently proportioned and not cramped or oversized. Evidence: overview-shared.png

criteria.name: component_states_match_reference
criteria.description: Default/hover/active treatments on primary controls are consistent with the reference's interactive chrome
criteria.reasoning: The active Quest tab uses gold treatment and underline; the Log reps control is visibly enabled and real hover measurement showed a translated hover state. Evidence: overview-shared.png

criteria.name: history_empty_state_before_logs
criteria.description: Before any set is logged, the History tab shows a placeholder message explaining what will appear there instead of an empty list
criteria.reasoning: The History tab visibly showed “No sets logged yet” with explanatory placeholder text. Evidence: history_empty_state_before_logs-shared.png

criteria.name: log_reps_invalid_inline_errors
criteria.description: Empty, zero, negative, non-integer, or out-of-range reps show a visible inline error naming the reps field and do not change today's total, lifetime reps, or character position
criteria.reasoning: Submitting 0 reps produced the visible inline error “Reps: enter a whole number from 1 to 9999,” while lifetime and today remained 0. Evidence: log_reps_invalid_inline_errors-shared.png

criteria.name: note_over_120_rejected
criteria.description: A note longer than 120 characters shows an inline error naming the note field and does not create a History entry
criteria.reasoning: A 121-character note produced the visible error “Note: keep it to 120 characters or fewer” and no set was created. Evidence: note_over_120_rejected-shared.png

criteria.name: zone_unlock_and_boss_defeat_feedback
criteria.description: Zone unlock and boss defeat each show a transient confirmation banner in addition to the map palette or marker change
criteria.reasoning: Boss defeat showed a “Boss defeated! +10 quest points” banner with the map marker state, and later zone progression showed “Zone unlocked: Canyon” plus the map palette changed to Canyon. Evidence: zone_unlock_and_boss_defeat_feedback-zone.png; zone_unlock_and_boss_defeat_feedback-zone-unlock.png

criteria.name: challenge_idle_log_rejected
criteria.description: Logging reps while a challenge run is not active shows visible feedback and does not advance the run
criteria.reasoning: Logging 1 challenge rep while Idle showed “Start an active run before logging challenge reps” and the run remained at 0/20. Evidence: challenge_idle_log_rejected-shared.png

criteria.name: reset_cancel_leaves_state
criteria.description: Canceling the Reset Quest confirmation dialog leaves lifetime reps, History, gear, and checkpoint untouched
criteria.reasoning: Escape closed the reset dialog and the visible export preview still showed lifetimeReps 100, quest points, unlocked gear/zones, and four sets. Evidence: reset_cancel_leaves_state-shared.png

criteria.name: undo_redo_disabled_when_empty
criteria.description: Undo and Redo controls are disabled, not merely ignored, when there is nothing to undo or redo
criteria.reasoning: Before any history action, both Undo and Redo were visibly disabled. Evidence: history_empty_state_before_logs-shared.png

criteria.name: weekly_chart_zero_day_ticks
criteria.description: Days with zero reps in the weekly summary chart still render a visible zero-height tick, never a blank chart area
criteria.reasoning: The weekly chart visibly rendered baseline zero-height ticks for Fri through Wed rather than blank space. Evidence: weekly_chart_zero_day_ticks-shared.png

criteria.name: reset_dialog_escape_and_confirm
criteria.description: The Reset Quest confirmation dialog closes on Escape or Cancel without wiping state, and Confirm performs the wipe
criteria.reasoning: Escape closed the confirmation dialog without wiping state; Confirm then showed “Quest reset — starting fresh” and the export preview showed lifetimeReps 0 and sets []. Evidence: reset_dialog_escape_and_confirm-shared.png; reset_dialog_escape_and_confirm-confirmed.png

criteria.name: challenge_lifecycle_progress_feedback
criteria.description: Challenge run status (idle, active, paused, Victory, Defeat) is always visible so the player knows which lifecycle step is current
criteria.reasoning: The live challenge UI visibly showed Idle, Active, Paused, and Victory statuses, with Victory feedback after logging 20/20 reps. Evidence: challenge_lifecycle_progress_feedback-shared.png; challenge_lifecycle_progress_feedback-victory.png

criteria.name: malformed_import_rejected
criteria.description: Importing a malformed Quest Log JSON leaves lifetime reps, History, gear, and settings unchanged and shows a visible invalid-file rejection
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: The malformed-file workflow could not be exercised because file-drop and in-memory file-selection attempts were rejected by the browser tooling; no import result was observed.

criteria.name: empty_export_still_valid_json
criteria.description: Export Quest Log with zero logged sets still downloads a valid JSON document whose sets array is empty and lifetimeReps is 0, without a crash
criteria.reasoning: With zero logged sets, Export Quest Log downloaded repquest-2026-07-23.json; the visible preview showed lifetimeReps 0 and sets [], and the app displayed “Quest Log exported.” Evidence: empty_export_still_valid_json-shared.png

criteria.name: save_resume_controls_gated
criteria.description: Resume Saved Run is disabled when no checkpoint exists; Save Progress is disabled when the challenge run is idle or already ended
criteria.reasoning: In Idle state, Save progress and Resume saved run were visibly disabled; after starting a run, Save progress remained disabled while Resume saved run was also disabled. Evidence: challenge_idle_log_rejected-shared.png; challenge_lifecycle_progress_feedback-shared.png

criteria.name: difficulty_locked_during_active_run
criteria.description: Changing difficulty while a run is active is disabled or rejected with visible feedback and does not alter the in-progress target mid-run
criteria.reasoning: After starting an active run, Easy, Normal, and Hard were all visibly disabled, leaving the target at 20 reps. Evidence: challenge_lifecycle_progress_feedback-shared.png

criteria.name: rapid_25_logs_integrity
criteria.description: Logging 25 rep sets back to back leaves lifetime reps, today's total, and History exactly matching the sum entered with no frozen or blank screen
criteria.reasoning: Twenty-five rapid UI submissions for 1 through 25 left 25 History entries and lifetime/today totals of 325, matching the arithmetic sum, with the app fully rendered. Evidence: rapid_25_logs_integrity-shared.png

criteria.name: delightful_challenge_moments
criteria.description: Beyond the required Victory confetti, the challenge loop includes an extra delightful moment (for example a distinct Victory sting, streak flourish, or boss intro) that feels intentional
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Victory state was observed, but no distinct extra sting, streak flourish, or boss-intro moment beyond the standard Victory panel was visible. Evidence: victory-shared.png

criteria.name: advanced_map_or_chart_polish
criteria.description: The quest map or weekly chart includes polish beyond the minimum (parallax sky, waypoint pulse, chart hover readout) that aids readability
criteria.reasoning: The weekly chart provides exact daily totals and hover-oriented readout support beyond a static chart. Evidence: quest-full-shared.png

criteria.name: guided_first_run_help
criteria.description: A brief first-run tip or coachmark explains Log Reps or Challenge without blocking core play
criteria.reasoning: A non-blocking “Welcome to RepQuest” first-run tip explains Log reps, Challenge mode, and shortcuts. Evidence: initial-shared.png

criteria.name: enhanced_heatmap_interaction
criteria.description: Heat-map cells expose day totals on hover or focus beyond the minimum static grid
criteria.reasoning: Hovering a heat-map cell revealed “2026-07-23 — 10 reps (of 50 goal).” Evidence: heatmap-shared.png

criteria.name: keyboard_power_user_paths
criteria.description: Power-user keyboard shortcuts (beyond Tab) accelerate Log Reps or mode switching without breaking mouse play
criteria.reasoning: The live shortcuts dialog lists L for Log reps, 1–4 for tabs, M for mode switching, and ? for help. Evidence: shortcuts-shared.png

criteria.name: preference_personalization_extra
criteria.description: An optional preference (theme accent, reminder copy style, or chart density) personalizes the chrome beyond the required settings payload
criteria.reasoning: Settings visibly offers Amber, Teal, and Rose appearance accent choices. Evidence: export-preview-shared.png

criteria.name: quest_narrative_flavor
criteria.description: Zone unlock or boss copy carries light quest narrative flavor that stays consistent with RepQuest's fitness-quest identity
criteria.reasoning: Quest copy consistently frames reps as moving a hero, unlocking zones, and beating bosses, with a Boss challenge mode and waypoint target. Evidence: quest-progress-shared.png

criteria.name: export_preview_polish
criteria.description: Export surfaces include a live preview pane of Quest Log JSON or CSV before download, updating as sets are logged
criteria.reasoning: Quest Log includes a live JSON/CSV preview area with export and copy controls; the JSON preview visibly contains the logged set. Evidence: export-preview-shared.png

criteria.name: genre_appropriate_extras
criteria.description: A genre-appropriate extra (personal-best toast, weekly summary blurb, or difficulty tip) adds value without cluttering the first viewport
criteria.reasoning: Personal records and a weekly summary with daily totals add useful fitness-quest feedback. Evidence: quest-full-shared.png

criteria.name: competition_level_innovation
criteria.description: Overall execution shows competition-level craft: cohesive motion, clear competitive loop, and a useful export end state working together
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The app has a clear challenge loop and export preview, but I did not observe the cohesive motion/competitive polish working together at competition level. Evidence: victory-shared.png

criteria.name: zone_palettes_distinct
criteria.description: Each unlocked zone (Foothills, Canyon, Summit) paints the quest map canvas with its own distinct sky/ground palette so the current region is identifiable at a glance
criteria.reasoning: Foothills, Canyon, and Summit were observed with distinct blue/green, orange, and purple sky/ground palettes. Evidence: initial-shared.png, zone-100.png, zone-summit-300.png

criteria.name: boss_marker_distinction
criteria.description: Boss Challenge waypoints render visibly larger and in a different color than normal waypoints, with a clearly different defeated treatment once cleared
criteria.reasoning: Boss waypoints were visibly larger/red than normal markers, while cleared bosses appeared as large green check markers. Evidence: zone-summit-300.png

criteria.name: goal_progress_color_thresholds
criteria.description: The daily-goal progress fill uses a clear color threshold (below half, at/above half, at/above goal) so progress reads without checking the numbers
criteria.reasoning: Progress visibly changed red below half, amber at 60%, and green at goal completion. Evidence: goal-below-half.png, goal-half.png, goal-met.png

criteria.name: gear_locked_unlocked_treatment
criteria.description: Locked outfits in the Gear Shop show a muted/grayscale treatment that turns to full color once unlocked; the equipped outfit is clearly marked as selected among unlocked options
criteria.reasoning: Locked outfits were grayscale/muted; unlocking Warrior armor restored color and showed a clear equipped selection ring/label. Evidence: gear.png, gear-unlocked.png

criteria.name: empty_states_render
criteria.description: Before any set is logged, the History tab shows a friendly placeholder message, and the weekly summary chart shows all-zero bars rather than a blank area
criteria.reasoning: History showed a friendly no-sets placeholder, and the weekly summary rendered seven zero-value bars rather than a blank area. Evidence: history-empty.png, empty-quest-full.png

criteria.name: active_tab_visually_distinct
criteria.description: Tab navigation (Quest / History / Gear / Settings) is visually distinct for the active tab versus inactive tabs
criteria.reasoning: The selected tab used bright text and an accent underline while inactive tabs were muted and borderless. Evidence: settings.png

criteria.name: meta_screens_cohesive_styling
criteria.description: Meta screens (tab bar, Settings forms, Gear Shop cards, History list, dialogs, notification banners, Export/Import controls, Personal Records, and streak heat-map) share cohesive component styling distinct from the hand-rendered canvas play surfaces
criteria.reasoning: Settings, Gear, History, export controls, heat-map, dialogs, and banners consistently used cohesive dark cards, borders, rounded controls, and accent styling distinct from the illustrated canvas. Evidence: settings.png, gear.png, history-empty.png, empty-quest-full.png

criteria.name: victory_defeat_visually_distinct
criteria.description: Victory and Defeat result panels are visually distinct from each other (success-toned vs warning/defeat-toned) so the decided outcome reads at a glance
criteria.reasoning: Victory rendered as a success-toned panel, while Defeat rendered as a contrasting dark red warning panel with distinct copy and icon treatment. Evidence: victory.png, defeat.png

criteria.name: heatmap_cell_treatments_distinct
criteria.description: Heat-map cells for empty, below-goal, and at-or-above-goal days are visually distinct by fill intensity or color
criteria.reasoning: Empty cells were dark, below-goal cells amber, and goal-met cells green; their accessible labels also reflected the states. Evidence: empty-quest-full.png, heatmap-below.png, heatmap-goal.png

criteria.name: single_consistent_icon_set
criteria.description: Icons appear from a single consistent icon set across tabs, buttons, and status indicators with no mismatched icon styles
criteria.reasoning: Tabs, buttons, banners, cards, and status indicators consistently used the same outlined SVG icon style and proportions. Evidence: settings.png
